---
title: "Data structure reconstruction"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---


#libraries
```{r load library, include=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(deSolve)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(Hmisc)
library(broom)
```

#load data (change pathway here)
```{r load data, echo = FALSE}
## Monoculture
mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_0hr <- read_excel("20250809 mono-culture growth assay of CeMbio strains wo nitrocellulose membrane.xlsx", 
    sheet = "0 hr")
mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_24hr <- read_excel("20250809 mono-culture growth assay of CeMbio strains wo nitrocellulose membrane.xlsx", 
    sheet = "24 hr")
mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_1_0hr <- read_excel("20260514 mono-culture growth assay of CeMbio strains (initial OD=0.1).xlsx", 
    sheet = "0 hr")
mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_1_24hr <- read_excel("20260514 mono-culture growth assay of CeMbio strains (initial OD=0.1).xlsx", 
    sheet = "24 hr")
mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_5_0hr <- read_excel("20260518 mono-culture growth assay of CeMbio strains (initial OD=0.5).xlsx", 
    sheet = "0 hr")
mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_5_12hr <- read_excel("20260518 mono-culture growth assay of CeMbio strains (initial OD=0.5).xlsx", 
    sheet = "12 hr")
mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_5_24hr <- read_excel("20260518 mono-culture growth assay of CeMbio strains (initial OD=0.5).xlsx", 
    sheet = "24 hr")

##Pairwise culture
#Jub19 vs other
Pairwise_culture_JUb19_0hr <- read_excel("20260111 Pairwise competition assay (JUb19 vs CeMbio)-summary.xlsx", 
    sheet = "0 hr")
Pairwise_culture_JUb19_24hr <- read_excel("20260111 Pairwise competition assay (JUb19 vs CeMbio)-summary.xlsx", 
    sheet = "24 hr")

#pair wise culture MSPm1 vs other (lack Jub19)
Pairwise_culture_MSPm1_0hr <- read_excel("20260414 Pairwise competition assay (MSPm1 vs CeMbio)-summary.xlsx", 
    sheet = "0 hr")
Pairwise_culture_MSPm1_24hr <- read_excel("20260414 Pairwise competition assay (MSPm1 vs CeMbio)-summary.xlsx", 
    sheet = "24 hr")


JUb19_male_leaving_raw_data <- read_excel("JUb19 male leaving raw data.xlsx", 
    sheet = "Sheet1")

Pairwise_competition_assay_JUb19_vs_CEN2ent_DR_91_19 <- read_excel("20260508 Pairwise competition assay (JUb19 vs CEN2ent)-DR=91 ; 19.xlsx")
```

<!-- # Data format reconstruction
Data formating from monoculture (mono_0hr, mono_24hr, mono_df(conbine 0hr and 24hr), monoMean_df (calculate strains mean of mono_df))-->

# Monoculture bacteria strain in 0 hr and 24 hr (OD1)
Compile data from different sheets to get population size at start (0 hr) and end (24 hr) points under OD = 1.
```{r monoculture OD1, echo = FALSE}
# Monoculture 0 hr treatment
mono_0hr_untreat <- mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_0hr

# 1. find block starts
start_idx <- c(0, which(mono_0hr_untreat$`0hr` == "0hr"))

# 2. extract blocks
blocks <- map(seq_along(start_idx), function(i) {
  
  start <- start_idx[i]
  end <- if (i < length(start_idx)) start_idx[i + 1] - 1 else nrow(mono_0hr_untreat)
  
  block <- mono_0hr_untreat[start:end, ]
  
  # remove empty rows
  block <- block %>% filter(!if_all(everything(), is.na))
  
  if (i == 1) {
    # FIRST BLOCK → KEEP ORIGINAL COLUMN NAMES
    block <- block %>%
      rename(metric = `0hr`)
    
  } else {
    new_names <- as.character(unlist(block[1, ]))
    

# remove NA column names completely
    valid_cols <- !is.na(new_names) & new_names != ""
    
    block <- block[, valid_cols]
    new_names <- new_names[valid_cols]
    
# make names unique (important!)
new_names <- make.unique(new_names)

colnames(block) <- new_names
  
  # remove header row
  block <- block[-1, ]
  
  # rename first column
  names(block)[1] <- "metric"
  }
  # reshape long
  block_long <- block %>%
    pivot_longer(-metric, names_to = "strain", values_to = "value")
  
  return(block_long)
})

# 3. combine
tidy_df <- bind_rows(blocks)

# 4. clean numbers
tidy_df <- tidy_df %>%
  mutate(value = parse_number(value))

# 5. assign replicate IDs
mono_0hr <- tidy_df %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = metric, values_from = value) %>%
  
  # FIRST clean strain names
  mutate(
    strain = str_remove(strain, "\\.\\.\\.\\d+$"),
    strain = str_remove(strain, "\\.\\d+$")
  ) %>%
  
  # THEN assign replicate correctly
  group_by(strain) %>%
  mutate(replicate = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  mutate(`growth time` = "0hr") %>%  #
  select(strain, replicate, everything())
# mono_0hr

## Monoculture 24 hr treatment
mono_24hr_untreat <- mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_24hr

# 1. find block starts
start_idx <- c(0, which(mono_24hr_untreat$`24hr` == "24hr"))

# 2. extract blocks
blocks <- map(seq_along(start_idx), function(i) {
  
  start <- start_idx[i]
  end <- if (i < length(start_idx)) start_idx[i + 1] - 1 else nrow(mono_24hr_untreat)
  
  block <- mono_24hr_untreat[start:end, ]
  
  # remove empty rows
  block <- block %>% filter(!if_all(everything(), is.na))
  
  if (i == 1) {
    # FIRST BLOCK → KEEP ORIGINAL COLUMN NAMES
    block <- block %>%
      rename(metric = `24hr`)
    
  } else {
    # OTHER BLOCKS → USE HEADER ROW
    
    new_names <- as.character(unlist(block[1, ]))
    

# remove NA column names completely
    valid_cols <- !is.na(new_names) & new_names != ""
    
    block <- block[, valid_cols]
    new_names <- new_names[valid_cols]
    
# make names unique (important!)
new_names <- make.unique(new_names)

colnames(block) <- new_names
  
  # remove header row
  block <- block[-1, ]
  
  # rename first column
  names(block)[1] <- "metric"
  }
  # reshape long
  block_long <- block %>%
    pivot_longer(-metric, names_to = "strain", values_to = "value")
  
  return(block_long)
})

# 3. combine
tidy_df <- bind_rows(blocks)

# 4. clean numbers
tidy_df <- tidy_df %>%
  mutate(value = parse_number(value))

# 5. assign replicate IDs
mono_24hr <- tidy_df %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = metric, values_from = value) %>%
  
  # FIRST clean strain names
  mutate(
    strain = str_remove(strain, "\\.\\.\\.\\d+$"),
    strain = str_remove(strain, "\\.\\d+$")
  ) %>%
  
  # THEN assign replicate correctly
  group_by(strain) %>%
  mutate(replicate = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  mutate(`growth time` = "24hr") %>%  #
  select(strain, replicate, everything())
# mono_24hr

## combine mono_0hr and mono_24hr
mono_df <- inner_join(
  mono_0hr %>% select(strain, replicate, M0 = `CFU/ml`,logM0 = `log CFU/ml`),
  mono_24hr %>% select(strain, replicate, M24 = `CFU/ml`,logM24 = `log CFU/ml`),
  by = c("strain", "replicate")
)
mono_df # Print file

mono_df <- mono_df %>%
  filter(strain != "OP50") # OP50 is background strain

monoMean_df <- mono_df %>%
  group_by(strain) %>%
  summarise(mean_M0 = mean(M0, na.rm = TRUE), mean_M24=mean(M24, na.rm = TRUE), 
            mean_logM0 = mean(logM0, na.rm = TRUE), mean_logM24 = mean(logM24, na.rm = TRUE), 
            .groups = "drop")
# monoMean_df
```

## OD0.1 and OD0.5 data reconstruction and binding to OD1 data
Based on May 7th Discussion, conducted monoculture growth assay at lower initial densities. Compile data from all OD values.
```{r monoculture other OD, echo = FALSE}
clean_mono_sheet <- function(raw_df, time_label, OD) {
  
  parse_num2 <- function(x) {
    x <- as.character(x)
    x <- str_replace_all(x, ",", "")
    x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\s+", "")
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  }
  
  clean_strain_name <- function(x) {
    x %>%
      str_remove("\\.\\.\\.\\d+$") %>%  # remove ...2, ...3
      str_remove("\\.\\d+$")            # remove .1, .2
  }
  
  raw_df <- as_tibble(raw_df)
  
  time_col <- if (time_label %in% names(raw_df)) {
    time_label
  } else {
    names(raw_df)[1]
  }
  
  start_idx <- c(0, which(str_squish(as.character(raw_df[[time_col]])) == time_label))
  
  blocks <- map(seq_along(start_idx), function(i) {
    
    start <- start_idx[i]
    end <- if (i < length(start_idx)) {
      start_idx[i + 1] - 1
    } else {
      nrow(raw_df)
    }
    
    block <- raw_df[start:end, ]
    
    block <- block %>%
      filter(!if_all(everything(), ~ is.na(.x) | as.character(.x) == ""))
    
    if (nrow(block) == 0) {
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    if (i == 1) {
      
      block <- block %>%
        rename(metric = all_of(time_col))
      
    } else {
      
      new_names <- as.character(unlist(block[1, ]))
      
      valid_cols <- !is.na(new_names) & new_names != ""
      
      block <- block[, valid_cols, drop = FALSE]
      new_names <- new_names[valid_cols]
      
      new_names <- make.unique(new_names)
      colnames(block) <- new_names
      
      block <- block[-1, ]
      names(block)[1] <- "metric"
    }
    
    # 這裡才是關鍵：
    # 不要用欄名後面的數字當 replicate
    # 要依照清乾淨後的 strain name，在同一個 strain 內重新編 1,2,3
    replicate_map <- tibble(
      strain_raw = names(block)[-1]
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        strain = clean_strain_name(strain_raw)
      ) %>%
      group_by(strain) %>%
      mutate(
        replicate = row_number()
      ) %>%
      ungroup()
    
    block_long <- block %>%
      pivot_longer(
        cols = -metric,
        names_to = "strain_raw",
        values_to = "value"
      ) %>%
      left_join(replicate_map, by = "strain_raw") %>%
      mutate(
        metric = str_squish(as.character(metric)),
        value = parse_num2(value),
        OD = as.character(OD),
        `growth time` = time_label
      ) %>%
      select(strain, replicate, OD, `growth time`, metric, value)
    
    return(block_long)
  })
  
  tidy_df <- bind_rows(blocks)
  
  mono_clean <- tidy_df %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols = c(strain, replicate, OD, `growth time`),
      names_from = metric,
      values_from = value,
      values_fn = first
    ) %>%
    arrange(strain, OD, replicate)
  
  return(mono_clean)
}

mono_OD_0_1_0hr <- clean_mono_sheet(
  raw_df = mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_1_0hr,
  time_label = "0hr",
  OD = "0.1"
)

mono_OD_0_1_24hr <- clean_mono_sheet(
  raw_df = mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_1_24hr,
  time_label = "24hr",
  OD = "0.1"
)

mono_OD_0_5_0hr <- clean_mono_sheet(
  raw_df = mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_5_0hr,
  time_label = "0hr",
  OD = "0.5"
)

mono_OD_0_5_12hr <- clean_mono_sheet(
  raw_df = mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_5_12hr,
  time_label = "12hr",
  OD = "0.5"
)

mono_OD_0_5_24hr <- clean_mono_sheet(
  raw_df = mono_culture_growth_assay_of_CeMbio_strains_initial_OD_0_5_24hr,
  time_label = "24hr",
  OD = "0.5"
)

mono_all_long <- bind_rows(
  mono_OD_0_1_0hr,
  mono_OD_0_1_24hr,
  mono_OD_0_5_0hr,
  mono_OD_0_5_12hr,
  mono_OD_0_5_24hr
) %>%
  arrange(strain, OD, replicate, `growth time`)

mono_df_all <- mono_all_long %>%
  mutate(
    time_suffix = case_when(
      `growth time` == "0hr" ~ "0",
      `growth time` == "12hr" ~ "12",
      `growth time` == "24hr" ~ "24",
      TRUE ~ str_remove(`growth time`, "hr")
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    strain,
    replicate,
    OD,
    time_suffix,
    `CFU/ml`,
    `log CFU/ml`
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(strain, replicate, OD),
    names_from = time_suffix,
    values_from = c(`CFU/ml`, `log CFU/ml`),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{time_suffix}"
  ) %>%
  rename(
    M0 = `CFU/ml_0`,
    M12 = `CFU/ml_12`,
    M24 = `CFU/ml_24`,
    logM0 = `log CFU/ml_0`,
    logM12 = `log CFU/ml_12`,
    logM24 = `log CFU/ml_24`
  ) %>%
  arrange(strain, OD, replicate)
mono_df_all <- bind_rows(
  mono_df_all,
  mono_df %>%
    mutate(OD = "1")
)
mono_df_all # Print file

# 分開保留
mono_df_OD_0_1 <- mono_df_all %>%
  filter(OD == "0.1")

mono_df_OD_0_5 <- mono_df_all %>%
  filter(OD == "0.5")

# 分開算 mean
monoMean_OD_0_1 <- mono_df_OD_0_1 %>%
  group_by(strain) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_M0 = mean(M0, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_M24 = mean(M24, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_logM0 = mean(logM0, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_logM24 = mean(logM24, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(OD = "0.1")
# monoMean_OD_0_1

monoMean_OD_0_5 <- mono_df_OD_0_5 %>%
  group_by(strain) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_M0 = mean(M0, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_M12 = mean(M12, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_M24 = mean(M24, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_logM0 = mean(logM0, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_logM12 = mean(logM12, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_logM24 = mean(logM24, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(OD = "0.5")
# monoMean_OD_0_5
```
